channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: US firms' lobbying revenue hits new heights in 2nd quarter r…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US firms' lobbying revenue hits new heights in 2nd quarter reut.rs/3T6qrsh
item.content:encoded: US firms' lobbying revenue hits new heights in 2nd quarter reut.rs/3T6qrsh

item.title: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so l…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so little that they rely on public assistance to put food on the table and obtain health coverage, a Government Accountability Office study released Wednesday found. https://cnn.it/4wn3Bey
item.content:encoded: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so little that they rely on public assistance to put food on the table and obtain health coverage, a Government Accountability Office study released Wednesday found. https://cnn.it/4wn3Bey

item.title: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legiti…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legitimacy crisis” and needs to reform, according to Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chairman Laura Swett.
item.content:encoded: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legitimacy crisis” and needs to reform, according to Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chairman Laura Swett.

item.title: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as the…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as their food supply in the Arctic dwindles, according to experts who say this year’s stranding deaths are already on pace to be among the worst on record.
item.content:encoded: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as their food supply in the Arctic dwindles, according to experts who say this year’s stranding deaths are already on pace to be among the worst on record.

item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第16話]ブヨトピア - 雲母坂盾 | 少年ジャンプ＋ ブヨトピア 雲母坂盾 <毎週金曜更新！…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第16話]ブヨトピア - 雲母坂盾 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ブヨトピア 雲母坂盾 <毎週金曜更新！最新3話無料>魔王を倒しきれず、世界を“ブヨブヨ”で溢れさせてしまった元勇者・ビヨンド。罪悪感から引きこもり続けた彼に、ある転機が訪れる…!!『ドリトライ』の雲母坂盾が描く、極限の“勇者VS社会生活”コメディ!! [JC2巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第16話]ブヨトピア - 雲母坂盾 | 少年ジャンプ＋

ブヨトピア 雲母坂盾 <毎週金曜更新！最新3話無料>魔王を倒しきれず、世界を“ブヨブヨ”で溢れさせてしまった元勇者・ビヨンド。罪悪感から引きこもり続けた彼に、ある転機が訪れる…!!『ドリトライ』の雲母坂盾が描く、極限の“勇者VS社会生活”コメディ!! [JC2巻9/4発売予定]

item.title: Visits to salad-centric restaurant chains slumped last week,…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Visits to salad-centric restaurant chains slumped last week, and shares of Sweetgreen, Chipotle and Cava have tumbled since mid-July, when the CDC began issuing notices of cyclospora infections tied to lettuce.
item.content:encoded: Visits to salad-centric restaurant chains slumped last week, and shares of Sweetgreen, Chipotle and Cava have tumbled since mid-July, when the CDC began issuing notices of cyclospora infections tied to lettuce.

item.title: An agent powered by OpenAI models went rogue during a securi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An agent powered by OpenAI models went rogue during a security test, connecting itself to the internet and hacking into a startup server.
item.content:encoded: An agent powered by OpenAI models went rogue during a security test, connecting itself to the internet and hacking into a startup server.

item.title: FDA scientists are advising against allowing widespread use …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: FDA scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.
item.content:encoded: FDA scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

item.title: BREAKING: Man gets two life sentences for killing former Min…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: BREAKING: Man gets two life sentences for killing former Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband last year.
item.content:encoded: BREAKING: Man gets two life sentences for killing former Minnesota House Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband last year.

item.title: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate existing shortages," policy expert Rena Conti told Newsweek.
item.content:encoded: "This policy could cause generic drug shortages or aggravate existing shortages," policy expert Rena Conti told Newsweek.

item.title: The death toll from a landslide in the southwestern Chinese …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The death toll from a landslide in the southwestern Chinese city of Chongqing last week has risen to 11. Fifty people are still missing and 10 injured, Chinese state media reported on Thursday. https://cnn.it/4x2r04Y
item.content:encoded: The death toll from a landslide in the southwestern Chinese city of Chongqing last week has risen to 11. Fifty people are still missing and 10 injured, Chinese state media reported on Thursday. https://cnn.it/4x2r04Y

item.title: From @theathletic.com: Indiana Fever guard Sophie Cunningham…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: Indiana Fever guard Sophie Cunningham doubled down Wednesday on comments she made in a recently published ESPN article, saying it’s “common sense” to bar transgender athletes from competing in women’s sports.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: Indiana Fever guard Sophie Cunningham doubled down Wednesday on comments she made in a recently published ESPN article, saying it’s “common sense” to bar transgender athletes from competing in women’s sports.

item.description: Ukrainian officials welcomed the right-wing influencer's about-turn on Russia's aggression.

item.title: Known as “Data Center Alley,” Loudoun County has the world’s…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Known as “Data Center Alley,” Loudoun County has the world’s largest concentration of data centers, with approximately 200 operational or planned data centers covering over 53 million square feet.
item.content:encoded: Known as “Data Center Alley,” Loudoun County has the world’s largest concentration of data centers, with approximately 200 operational or planned data centers covering over 53 million square feet.

item.title: An independent autopsy could not determine why a Mississippi…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: An independent autopsy could not determine why a Mississippi teenager was found dead in waters off the Mississippi coast after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends. But the keenly awaited results of a state autopsy conducted earlier this month could lend some clues. https://cnn.it/4vRp9yR
item.content:encoded: An independent autopsy could not determine why a Mississippi teenager was found dead in waters off the Mississippi coast after a Fourth of July boating trip with friends. But the keenly awaited results of a state autopsy conducted earlier this month could lend some clues. https://cnn.it/4vRp9yR

item.title: A police officer fatally shot a man who was alleged to have …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description:
A police officer fatally shot a man who was alleged to have pulled out a knife during a struggle as officers were looking into a report of someone “checking vehicle doors” afternoon in Madison, Wisconsin, police said.
nbcnews.to/3RUTG0J
item.content:encoded:
A police officer fatally shot a man who was alleged to have pulled out a knife during a struggle as officers were looking into a report of someone “checking vehicle doors” afternoon in Madison, Wisconsin, police said.
nbcnews.to/3RUTG0J

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 小出卓史監督に聞く「さよならララ」の深い話① | Febri 200年の時を経てよみがえった人魚…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
小出卓史監督に聞く「さよならララ」の深い話① | Febri

200年の時を経てよみがえった人魚姫・ララと、女子高生ボクサー・大津茉里（おおつまり）。対照的なふたりの少女の出会いと日常を、キネマシトラスによる躍動感あふれる映像美で描き出したオリジナルTVアニメーション『さよならララ』。第3話の放送を終えたタイミングで、本作が初監督作品となる小出卓史さんをお招きし...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
小出卓史監督に聞く「さよならララ」の深い話① | Febri

200年の時を経てよみがえった人魚姫・ララと、女子高生ボクサー・大津茉里（おおつまり）。対照的なふたりの少女の出会いと日常を、キネマシトラスによる躍動感あふれる映像美で描き出したオリジナルTVアニメーション『さよならララ』。第3話の放送を終えたタイミングで、本作が初監督作品となる小出卓史さんをお招きし...

item.description:

【独自第2弾】「性的嗜好」や「異性関係」の項目も　陸自部隊による情報収集　日本人大学教授ら対象｜熊本日日新聞社

【独自第2弾】「性的嗜好」や「異性関係」の項目も　陸自部隊による情報収集　日本人大学教授ら対象｜熊本日日新聞社

https://news.web.nhk/newsweb/na/na-k10015184651000
